'''Publictechnic''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer, devoted to large industrial-maintenance droids.<ref name="CFTD" /> Though active by 13 [[Great ReSynchronization|GrS]],<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|sports/1344_1.html|Nuna-Ball League Looks to Expand}}</ref> it was still regarded as a recent entry to the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] droid [[market]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Its main manufacturing plant was on [[Sennatt]], as was its primary service center and "droid shop." The company primarily sold to [[City/Legends|municipal]] and [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] governments.<ref name="CFTD" />

On 13:4:4 GrS, [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50]] reported in their article on "[[Nuna-Ball League]] Looking to Expand" that the Publictechnic [[JR series]] [[Nuna-ball/Legends|Nuna-ball]] team achieved a 55-54 upset victory over the [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar]] [[B3NK series]] team.<ref name="HNN" />

{{Company-stub}}
